content:
Thanks for asking! I want to be careful here: as of my latest information (cutoff June 2024), I don't have evidence that Will Smith is confirmed to star in a new "Men in Black" movie. 

The original "Men in Black" trilogy featured Will Smith in the lead role, and there have been spin-offs without him, but I haven't seen any official announcements or credible reports confirming his return in a new installment. 

If you saw a claim recently, it might be speculation or a rumor. I’d recommend checking official sources like studio announcements or reputable entertainment news outlets for confirmation. If you have a specific source or article you read, I can help look through it together to see what evidence they provide.
